title: Clerk
doc_html:
§1625.  Clerk

The clerk of the Nineteenth Judicial District Court shall be ex officio the clerk of the juvenile court.  

Acts 1990, No. 158, §1, eff. July 1, 1990.
doc_text:
§1625.  Clerk
The clerk of the Nineteenth Judicial District Court shall be ex officio the clerk of the juvenile court.
Acts 1990, No. 158, §1, eff. July 1, 1990.
